intro_subtitle.message: Learn how to use Smart Bookmark

intro_step1_description.message: Pin the extension to the toolbar for quick access.

intro_step2_description.message: Set up API service to enable smart tags and semantic search.

intro_step3_description.message: Save web pages with one click, automatically generate tags and support custom editing

intro_step4_description.message: Type "sb" in the address bar to quickly search your bookmarks.

settings_services_dialog_models_tooltip.message: To ensure search result accuracy, embedding model modification is not supported. If needed, you can achieve this through custom service configuration

settings_services_dialog_similarity_thre.message: Similarity threshold is used to determine the similarity between search results and search terms. The larger the value, the higher the matching requirement, range 0-1. Recommended value: 0.3-0.6

Adjust the accuracy of search results. The larger the value, the more accurate the search results but may miss relevant content. The smaller the value, the more relaxed the results may include less relevant content

settings_services_dialog_hide_low_simila.message: When enabled, only search results with similarity above the threshold will be displayed

settings_privacy_description.message: The system will automatically detect and protect the following types of privacy pages. For these pages, content will not be read or analyzed:

settings_privacy_rule_auth_desc.message: Login, registration, password reset pages, etc.

settings_privacy_rule_account_desc.message: Personal profile, account settings, admin dashboard pages, etc.

settings_privacy_rule_payment_desc.message: Payment, billing, subscription management pages, etc.

settings_privacy_rule_message_desc.message: Email, private messages, chat pages, etc.

settings_privacy_rule_sensitive_desc.message: URLs containing sensitive information such as tokens, keys, etc.

settings_privacy_custom_domains_desc.message: In addition to the pages protected by default, you can also add domains that need additional protection

settings_sync_cloud_description.message: Official cloud sync service, currently only supports syncing bookmark data

settings_sync_webdav_description.message: Sync to your private storage space using WebDAV protocol

settings_sync_webdav_dialog_server_url_h.message: Complete URL address of the WebDAV server

settings_sync_webdav_dialog_folder_help.message: Folder path on the server where data is stored (can be automatically created by clicking the test button below)

settings_sync_webdav_dialog_auto_sync_he.message: When enabled, bookmark data will be synced to WebDAV server periodically, and 30 seconds after you modify local data

settings_sync_webdav_dialog_sync_interva.message: Set the time interval for auto sync, minimum 5 minutes, maximum 24 hours

settings_sync_webdav_dialog_conflict_loc.message: Use local data to completely overwrite server data (⚠️ It is recommended to backup first)

settings_sync_webdav_dialog_conflict_rem.message: Use server data to completely overwrite local data (⚠️ It is recommended to backup first)

settings_sync_cloud_dialog_auto_sync_hel.message: When enabled, bookmark data will be synced to the cloud periodically and automatically when bookmarks change

settings_sync_cloud_dialog_reset_help.message: Reset local sync cache. On next sync, no data will be deleted, only server and local bookmarks will be merged together

settings_about_intro_description.message: Smart Bookmark is an intelligent bookmark management tool that helps you manage and search bookmarks more efficiently. Through AI technology, it can automatically analyze web page content and generate tags, making your bookmark management easier.
